en_famille.intro: Musées GRATUITS, parcs immenses, nourriture halal abondante dans l'East End.

voyage_solo.intro: Londres en solo : facile, sûre, anglais universel, musées gratuits.

voyage_spirituel.intro: Centre islamique d'Europe : East London Mosque, galeries islamiques, British Museum.
voyage_spirituel.conseils: Jumu'ah à l'East London Mosque : des milliers de fidèles de toutes nationalités.

description_en: London, in the United Kingdom, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4/5. Muslim travelers will find 150 halal restaurants listed, 423 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind. Best time to visit: May–September.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to London: 150 halal restaurants listed, 423 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4/5.
